data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Commission rules by product/service/category', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and financial processes but do not include any checks or validations related to commission rules. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of validation for commission rules by product/service/category.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify commission rules by product/service/category.
